title: IT consulting & advisory
summary: A senior technologist in your corner — strategy, architecture reviews and honest second opinions that keep your roadmap grounded.

title: Software & web development
summary: From idea to shipped product: clean web apps, internal tools and integrations, built to be maintained — not just demoed.

title: Cloud & Azure
summary: Right-sized cloud on Microsoft Azure: migrations, infrastructure-as-code and cost-aware setups that scale when you do.

title: Security & certificate lifecycle
summary: Practical security hardening and certificate lifecycle management, so expiries and audits stop being a fire drill.

title: Automation & DevOps
summary: CI/CD pipelines, deployment gates and automation that remove manual toil and make releases boring — the good kind.

title: Run & support
summary: Dependable ongoing care: monitoring, maintenance and a steady hand when something needs attention out of hours.
